title: Reviews from the people who dine with us.
subtitle: Real feedback from our valued guests on Google Reviews.

items.name: Mohd Iftikhar
items.quote: Very nice place all services is all most. Food 5 out of 5. Great experience overall.

items.name: Deepak Deepu HC
items.quote: Good parking place, tasty food, feel like a family restaurant. The ambience is perfect for a casual outing.

items.name: Nikhil S
items.quote: Hygiene tasty food. I experienced a very good service. It offers table service and also self service. Washroom facility is also available.

items.name: Vinay NR
items.quote: Place is surrounded by trees and plants. Nice place in city outskirts. Food quality is good. Rating 4 out of 5.

items.name: Vinay Kumar
items.quote: Had tea here good. Quick service and comfortable seating in a natural setting.

items.name: Raghu R
items.quote: Good weather. Super tasty veg and non-veg food available here with good parking lot.
